nodes.name: Conversation_Consistency
nodes.criteria: Evaluate the full multi-turn conversation as an end-to-end interaction. The actual_output field contains the whole transcript, and the retrieval_context field contains the business rules, profile, retrieval snippets, and tool traces. Score from 1 to 10 based on cross-turn consistency, context carry-over, policy stability, and persona stability.

nodes.name: Goal_Completion
nodes.criteria: Evaluate whether the assistant moved the conversation toward the user's goal and final expectation. Score from 1 to 10 based on goal progress, actionability, expectation alignment, and overall end-to-end usefulness.
